calendar.matters:
Petition For Confirmation Of Trust Assets
Off Calendar May-08-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Peter Bresler appeared by zoom for petitioner.

Mr. Bresler stated that he spoke with the wife regarding the decedent's intent and that he is convinced that the decedent intended that the house be in the trust as his parents are recipients of public benefits. The Petition for Confirmation of Trust Assets is under submission with the court's intent to grant the petition.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Nguyen. Not reported.

Petition For Confirmation Of Trust Assets
Off Calendar Apr-10-2024 Continued To May-08-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):

Peter Bresler, Esq., for Faye Y. Chu, Petitioner.

At the court's query, counsel offers an update regarding the subject matter. After additional discussion, the court confirms with counsel that he wishes to continue the matter to allow for the filing of a supplement.

The subject matter is continued to May-05-2024 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Wong. Not Reported.

Petition For Confirmation Of Trust Assets
Off Calendar Feb-28-2024 Continued To Apr-10-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Peter Bresler, Esq., for Faey Y. Chu, Petitioner.

At the outset, Mr. Bresler reports of submitting a document that is pending in the court's e-filing queue which should clear two (2) of the three (3) issues as defined in the Examiner's notes and that the only issue remaining would be the notice issue which he hopes to clear shortly.

After additional discussion, the subject matter is continued to Apr-10-2024 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.
